title: serratula serrata
intro: Serratula serrata, also known as White Mullen or Serrate Mullen, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Serratula serrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
